---
title: '2014/01/11 Journal Sat'
date: '2014-01-12T06:13:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7987094443590479110'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140111.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

&nbsp;- 1/11/2014 06:27 AM<br />
&nbsp;- Thanks for. Jesus patience with my unbelief<br />
&nbsp;- Feeling blank<br />
&nbsp;- Late for work. Don't want to go. Apparently the whole dang country feels the same way. WF was featured in the la times for creating a culture of high pressure sales causing lapses in integrity.
